race.description: William Hill Each Way Extra Challenge Series Handicap Hurdle (0-100) (Div 1)
race.comment: POURQUOI POI (2) was an impressive 5L winner at Punchestown in October. Sent off favourite for his next start he came up short but subsequent absence suggests something amiss. Expected to be primed for return and if near best will prove hard to beat. EURO MAKER (12) posted best effort yet when 6L second at Cork. Open to any amount of further improvement and these conditions will suit. Major winning chance. THE DANCEN KID (3) was denied by just 2.75L when third at Leopardstown two starts back. That form reads strongly and looks close to a win judging on that. Easy to fancy in this field. MON SHERIFFE (9) was a promising 9L sixth at Bellewstown and can improve further here. Big each way player. Something for the Multiples: THE TOOTHPICKER (11)
